title: Elbow Grease Glass Cleaner Aerosol - Super Shine, Foaming Action | Cleans Windows, Mirrors, Glass - Streak Free (300ml)
features: STREAK-FREE CLEANING POWER: Elbow Grease Glass Cleaner provides a streak-free shine, ensuring your windows, mirrors, and glass surfaces are left sparkling and flawless. Use it on your mirrors and windows for a spotless, crystal-clear look that enhances any room.

VERSATILE USE: Perfect for use on various glass surfaces, this cleaner is ideal for windows, mirrors, glass tables, and even stove glass. Whether you’re tackling grease or fingerprints, this product handles it all with ease, making it an essential part of your cleaning supplies.

SUPER SHINE FORMULA: Elbow Grease’s special formula delivers a high-gloss finish that leaves your glass looking like new. Enjoy a deep clean and a professional-looking shine with minimal effort—great for both everyday use and when guests are coming over!

EASY APPLICATION: Simply shake the can, spray onto the surface from 15-25 cm away, and wipe with a clean microfibre cloth. The spray’s fine mist spreads evenly for effortless cleaning, leaving no residue behind, making it perfect for quick touch-ups.

FAST AND EFFECTIVE: Designed for quick drying, this cleaner ensures your glass surfaces are dry to the touch in no time. Whether you're cleaning windows, shower glass, or even glass tables, the fast-drying formula means you won't have to wait long before enjoying a gleaming surface.

SUITABLE FOR MULTIPLE SURFACES: This versatile cleaner can be used on a variety of glass surfaces throughout your home. From cleaning mirrors to washing windows or even removing streaks from shower glass, Elbow Grease is your go-to solution for all glass cleaning tasks.

CONVENIENT AEROSOL SPRAY: The 300ml or 400ml aerosol can is easy to store and perfect for quick, efficient cleaning. The spray nozzle ensures precise application, and with its ergonomic design, you can use it effortlessly on high or low surfaces, including windows and mirrors.

DEEP CLEANING PERFORMANCE: Experience powerful performance with Elbow Grease’s ability to remove stubborn grime, dirt, and fingerprints. Whether you're tidying up after a party or regularly maintaining your windows, this cleaner makes deep cleaning a breeze.

PART OF YOUR WINDOW CLEANING KIT: Add this glass cleaner to your window cleaning kit for flawless, streak-free windows and mirrors. It’s the perfect companion to your window vacuum, ensuring your glass surfaces are clean and clear with minimal effort.

ESSENTIAL HOUSEHOLD PRODUCT: Elbow Grease Glass Cleaner is an essential household item for anyone who wants a pristine home. With its powerful formula, it’s perfect for quick clean-ups and regular maintenance, ensuring your windows and mirrors always look their best.
description: Product Description The Elbow Grease Glass Cleaner is your ultimate solution for sparkling windows and mirrors. This powerful aerosol cleaner effortlessly tackles dirt, grease, and fingerprints, leaving surfaces gleaming with a streak-free finish. Whether it's for your home or office, this window cleaner brings a deep clean with minimal effort, perfect for windows, mirrors, glass tables, and even stove glass. Say goodbye to smudges and hello to clear, shiny glass surfaces that reflect light and brighten your space! This 300ml or 400ml spray can offers the perfect amount of cleaner for regular use, while its special formula ensures a super shine with every spray. Ideal for tackling everyday messes, this glass cleaner leaves a beautiful finish without any annoying streaks or residue. It’s the ideal addition to your window cleaning equipment and household essentials, whether you’re looking to refresh your home or prepare for special occasions. Use it in your cleaning routine for quick and easy results, and enjoy the deep-cleaning power of Elbow Grease! Ingredients 5-15% Aliphatic hydrocarbons, <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Anionic Surfactants, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Nitrate, Parfum, Limonene, Linalool Directions * Shake can well before use * Spray onto the surface at a distance of 15-25cm * Spread and wipe with a clean microfibre cloth / paper towel, turning frequently * Buff to a clean dry state * Avoid prolonged contact with wood, aluminium or any unsealed surfaces. If unsure test on an inconspicuous area. Avoid overspray, spray directly onto cloth and wipe for small area. See more
